header.title: Custom software and SaaS-style products for real operations
header.subtitle: We operate products in production ourselves, not only client projects, so we understand uptime, permissions, billing, and admin workflows end to end.

items.title: SaaS & customer-facing products
items.text: Subscription apps, portals, and multi-tenant systems with auth, roles, and essential admin tools.

items.title: Business platforms
items.text: Internal and external platforms built around real workflows, approvals, and role-based access.

items.title: Dashboards & data tools
items.text: Dashboards that speed up decisions with fewer spreadsheets and one reliable view of the business.

items.title: Integrations & automation
items.text: Stable integrations and automation between tools, reducing manual work, errors, and improving audit trails.
